name: Transform QuestionnaireResponse EQ-5D-5L to OMOP Measurement

data.name: get_fhir_data
data.sqlquery:
select qr.content
from fhir."QuestionnaireResponse" qr 
join fhir."Project" p 
on qr."projectId" = p."projectId" 
where p."name" = 'bf823d27-82b4-4a0c-95d0-c09b24e32e9c'
data.description: Get QuestionnaireResponse fhir data from database

data.name: transform_fhir_to_omop
data.description: Transforms fhir data to omop measurement using structure map

data.name: insert_into_omop_table
data.description: Insert the records into omop measurement table

data.name: py2table
data.description: Describe the task of node py2table_node_0

data.name: convert_to_tabular_dataframe
data.description: Convert column wise data to tabular

data.name: Truncate_OMOP_tables
data.python_code:
def exec(myinput):
    data = myinput.get("convert_to_tabular_dataframe").result                                                                   
                  
    qr_ids = data["measurement_source_value"].dropna().unique().tolist()
    if qr_ids:                                                                                                
        dao = SqlAlchemyDao(use_cache_db=False, database_code=database_code)
        metadata_obj = sql.MetaData(schema=cdm_schema)                                                                          
        table_obj = sql.Table("measurement", metadata_obj, autoload_with=dao.engine)
        delete_stmt = table_obj.delete().where(                                                                                 
            table_obj.c.measurement_source_value.in_(qr_ids)
        )                                                                                                                       
        dao.execute_sqlalchemy_statement(delete_stmt, lambda r: r.rowcount)                                                     
  
    return data
